Education

PhD in Computer Science

Centrum Wiskunde en Informatica (CWI) / Leiden University
2017 - 2021

MSc in Computer Science

Universidade Federal do Paraná
2015 - 2017

BSc in Computer Science

Universidade Federal do Ceará
2010 - 2014

Languages

  • Portuguese (Native)
  • English (Fluent)

Career Profile

Principal Engineer @ DuckDB Labs and core contributor to DuckDB, the open-source analytical in-process SQL database. I build core database infrastructure including the CSV Reader/Sniffer, ART Persistent Storage, Arrow & ADBC integration, Enum types, and the Extension framework.

Experiences

Principal Engineer

2025 - Present
DuckDB Labs, Amsterdam

Leading the development of core database infrastructure in DuckDB. Driving the CSV Reader/Sniffer, DuckLake, and the Extension framework.

Software Engineer

2023 - 2025
DuckDB Labs, Amsterdam

Built and maintained core DuckDB subsystems including the parallel CSV Reader & Sniffer, ART Persistent Storage, Arrow & ADBC integration (~38x faster than ODBC), Enum/Dictionary encoding, BIGNUM implementation, Python client, index joins, and zone maps.

Selected Talks: - Efficient CSV Parsing: On the Complexity of Simple Things — DSDSD 2024 - DuckDB: Bringing Analytical SQL Directly to Your Python Shell — FOSDEM 2023 - DuckDB: Bringing Analytical SQL Directly to Your Python Shell — EuroPython 2023 - DuckDB Extensions — DuckCon #2, Brussels 2023 - DuckDB: Analytical SQL in Python — QCon London 2023 - Data Analysis with DuckDB — J on the Beach 2023

Chief Operating Officer (COO)

2021 - 2023
DuckDB Labs, Amsterdam

Led day-to-day operations at DuckDB Labs during its early growth phase while also contributing to core DuckDB development, including the Arrow integration, Enum/Dictionary encoding, ART general implementation & Persistent Storage, BIGNUM, Python client, index joins, and zone maps.

Post-Doctoral Researcher

2021 - 2022
Centrum Wiskunde en Informatica (CWI), Amsterdam

Database Architectures group. Research on progressive indexing and analytical database systems.

Open Source Projects

DuckDB - An analytical in-process SQL database management system (36k+ stars). Core contributor since inception.
DuckLake - An integrated data lake and catalog format (2.5k+ stars).
Scrooge McDuck - A DuckDB extension for financial data analysis — Yahoo Finance and Ethereum blockchain scanning.
